input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for St. Michael's Hospital. There are 52 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "respiratory", "count": 6, "message": "6 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 7, "message": "7 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 6, "message": "6 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 10, "message": "10 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 8, "message": "8 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "general", "count": 5, "message": "5 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 6, "message": "6 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 4, "message": "4 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 6, "current_utilization": 95, "recommendation": "Projected full in 6 min. Consider: expedite discharges, divert CTAS 4-5."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto General Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-general", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto General Hospital (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Mount Sinai Hospital", "facility_id": "mount-sinai", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Mount Sinai Hospital (50% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: **Urgent Action Required:** St. Michael's is at 95% capacity and projected to be full in 6 minutes. Immediately expedite discharges and divert CTAS 4-5 patients to Toronto General, Mount Sinai, or CAMH (all at 50% capacity). Activate specific protocols for incoming respiratory, GI, cardiac, mental, neuro, and injury clusters as detailed in the alerts.
